name: QMC5883L 3-Axis Magnetometer
description: QST QMC5883L 3-axis magnetic sensor (compass), I2C address 0x0D, LGA-16 3x3x0.9mm. Land pattern per manufacturer datasheet. S1 must tie to VDDIO; C1 reservoir capacitor required.
dimensions_source: QST QMC5883L datasheet 1.0: §3.2 LGA-16 3x3x0.9, Fig.7 recommended land pattern (16 pads 0.325x0.25, pitch 0.5, radial centers +/-1.2625), Table 5 pinout.
